def: A genus of plants, including the onion, garlic, leek, chive,etc.
An apparatus which transmits automatically to a central stationatmospheric changes as marked by the anemometer, barometer,thermometer, etc.
Distinctly crystalline; -- used of rocks. Opposed to Ant:cryptocrystalline.
A genus of tough, leathery seaweeds, usually of a dull brownishgreen color; rockweed.
Indulgence of one's appetites, desires, or inclinations; -- theopposite of self-restraint, and self-denial.
Pertaining to the development of an embryo.

Composed of hydrogen and bromine; as, hydrobromic acid.Hydrobromic acid (Chem.), a colorless, pungent, corrosive gas, HBr,usually collected as a solution in water. It resembles hydrochloricacid, but is weaker and less stable. Called also hydrogen bromide.
Having the shape of a goblet or drinking cup.
